imageAlt: CIS Subcontractor - When a user in a UK Limited Company has enabled CIS with a zero or null initial balance and has any RTI payroll periods prepared or filed, allow them to disable CIS if no other locks are in place. roadmap item preview image
title: CIS Subcontractor - When a user in a UK Limited Company has enabled CIS with a zero or null initial balance and has any RTI payroll periods prepared or filed, allow them to disable CIS if no other locks are in place.
summaryBody: CIS Subcontractor - When a user in a UK Limited Company has enabled CIS with a zero or null initial balance and has any RTI payroll periods prepared or filed, allow them to disable CIS if no other locks are in place.
